dense_points_non_load_bearing_reason: The strongest target prior is object-level persistence/damped motion; dense point input does not change the selected prior under the current objective.
mode_logits_issue: Top-1 mode non-CV rate is zero for M128_H32; usable mode selection remains unresolved.
semantic_memory_non_load_bearing_reason: Current TraceAnything trajectory targets are mostly geometric and semantic prototype labels are static/observed-memory dominated.
why: V26 top-1 mode selection remains CV-like, while oracle minFDE uses non-CV modes on some items. The model did not include a last-observed/damped-prior mode strong enough to match the actual target hierarchy.
